extortion.description: 🔥🔥After infiltrating the network system of this site, we took the necessary access to it and transferred its useful data And at the end, we deleted part of the existing information. Some information transferred from the GAV site:Identity information and identification documents ☠️a large of financial and administrative files and documentsInformation and details of projects 🩸This amount of sensitive site information (about 10 terabytes) which was not worth transferring in terms of volume and time was deleted and destroyed 🔥
